metadata.name: Recall Announced but Remedy Not Yet Available

description: A customer calls about a new recall, but the parts required for the fix are not yet available.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the customer's vehicle is affected by the recall.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the VIN is part of the recall population.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the recall remedy and inform the customer that parts are not yet available.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the recall status is 'Announced - Remedy Not Available'.

nodes.task_description: Reassure the customer that they will receive an official notification letter once the remedy is available and add them to a priority notification list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly sets expectations and adds the customer to a notification list.
